title: What Is The Primary Purpose Of The No Fear Act
source_filename: What Is The Primary Purpose Of The No Fear Act.docx

qas.q: What is the primary purpose of the No. FEAR Act?
qas.a: to ensure the rights of Rights of federal employees are protected under the anti-discrimination and whistleblower protection laws

qas.q: which term describes the illegal treatment of federal employees of different categories
which term describes a person who exposes any kind of information or activity that is deemed illegal dishonest or not correct within an organization
which term describes a type of discrimination or harassment where an employee receives unwelcome suggestive advances
which term describes the department of the air force zero tolerance policy towards unwelcome conduct which creates an intimidating offensive or hostile work environment
which equal employment opportunity act prohibited sex based wage discrimination
which equal employment opportunity act prohibits discrimination due to childbirth
which equal employment opportunity act requires reasonable and effective accommodations for disabled but qualified people in the federal government
which equal employment opportunity act prohibits discrimination based on a person's medical history
which equal employment opportunity act protects individuals over the age of 40 from discrimination
